data.title: PTA Connected Initiative provides free tools to help families set healthy limits for children in digital age. #YouthDigitalHabits
data.description: A program called PTA Connected Initiative in Alexandria, Va., established on July 25, 2025, is aiding families with raising children in the digital era. This initiative offers free tools to assist in setting healthy boundaries and fostering positive digital experiences. Parenting in the digital age presents challenges, with families struggling to navigate the complexities. PTA Connected aims to address this by equipping families with resources to manage technology use effectively. By providing these tools, the program hopes to facilitate a healthier digital environment for children.

data.title: Arch Insurance introduces new Individual Supplemental Health product suite to help with out-of-pocket expenses, covering deductibles, co-insurance, and out-of-network charges.
data.description: Arch Insurance’s Accident & Health division based in Hunt Valley, Maryland has introduced a new suite of Individual Supplemental Health products. This offering is aimed at aiding individuals in handling out-of-pocket costs that are often not included in primary medical plans, like deductibles, co-insurance, and out-of-network fees. The suite includes various benefits such as Accident Medical Expenses. This initiative is in line with Arch Insurance’s commitment to providing comprehensive insurance solutions to both businesses and individuals.

data.title: Revival Healthcare Capital partners with Olympus for $458 million investment in co-founded company Swan EndoSurgical, boosting robotics innovation.
data.description: Revival Healthcare Capital, based in Austin, Texas, has revealed a new strategic alliance with Olympus. This partnership will involve a combined investment of up to $458 million into Swan EndoSurgical.

data.title: $3.7B worth of Bitcoin moved to exchanges, causing massive selling pressure. Liquidations surpass $500M as Bitcoin falls 1.8%.
data.description: The value of Bitcoin experienced a 1.8% decline following reports of significant movements of approximately $3.7 billion worth of BTC to various exchanges by Galaxy Digital and other entities. This large influx of Bitcoin into the market sparked substantial selling pressure and forced liquidations.

data.title: Diana Shipping Inc. secures a time charter contract with Cargill Ocean Transportation for m/v DSI Phoenix at US$13,500/day until Nov 30, 2026.
data.description: In Athens, Greece on July 25, 2025, Diana Shipping Inc. (NYSE: DSX), a renowned global shipping company focusing on owning and bareboat charter-in of dry bulk vessels, revealed a new development. The company, through a wholly-owned subsidiary, has secured a time charter contract with Cargill Ocean Transportation (Singapore) Pte. Ltd. The agreement is for the Ultramax dry bulk vessel, the m/v DSI Phoenix, at a gross charter rate of US$13,500, with a 4.75% commission to third parties. This charter spans from August 3, 2025, until at least October 1, 2026, potentially extending until November 30, 2026.

data.title: Mitek will report Q3 fiscal 2025 results on Aug 7, 2025, after market close. Conference call at 2pm PT with CEO Ed West and CFO Dave Lyle.
data.description: San Diego-based Mitek Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: MITK), a prominent player in digital identity verification and fraud prevention globally, will be announcing its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal year 2025, which concluded on June 30, 2025. The disclosure will occur post the closure of the U.S. market on Thursday, August 7, 2025. A conference call and live webcast are scheduled at 2 p.m. PT (5 p.m. ET) to deliberate on the outcomes. The call will feature Mitek CEO Ed West and CFO Dave Lyle providing insights, followed by a question and answer session.

data.title: BitGo establishes Brazil subsidiary for crypto custody, treasury services. A decade of experience cited in custody solutions.
data.description: BitGo, a prominent digital asset infrastructure firm, has recently revealed the commencement of operations for its Brazilian subsidiary, BitGo Brasil Tecnologia Ltda. This strategic move aims to support the company's global growth strategy and ensure compliance with forthcoming regulations governing virtual asset service providers. Bringing with it more than ten years of expertise in offering custody solutions and services for digital assets, BitGo is optimistic about the evolving regulatory landscape in Brazil.

data.title: BetterRX secures investment from BVP Forge, appoints Tim Tannert as CEO to revolutionize hospice pharmacy care nationwide.
data.description: Salt Lake City - BetterRX, a top hospice pharmacy platform, revealed a key investment from BVP Forge to boost its growth. Tim Tannert has been appointed as the new CEO. The investment will propel BetterRX's goal of reducing suffering from medication delays by broadening its platform, driving innovation, and enhancing hospice medication management standards. Specialized for hospice care, this move signifies a significant advancement for BetterRX's future endeavors.

data.title: Infinity Flight Group buys 10 more Cessna Skyhawk aircraft, totaling 35 over 3 years, boosting pilots training.
data.description: Textron Aviation Inc., a subsidiary of Textron Inc. (NYSE:TXT), recently disclosed a deal with Infinity Flight Group to procure 10 more Cessna Skyhawk aircraft, slated for delivery in 2027. Over the past three years, Infinity Flight Group has consistently grown its fleet, placing orders for a total of 35 new Cessna Skyhawks. As a certified Cessna Pilot Center, the group presently utilizes 65 Cessna Skyhawks at their facilities based in Trenton-M.
